title: 2026-07-14｜Daily English

reviewQuiz.zh: 减少结账流程中的用户流失

words.meaning: 归因；判断一次转化或结果来自哪个渠道或动作
words.sentence: Accurate conversion attribution helps the team understand which entry point drives completed bookings.
The product should remind users before the subscription renewal date.

words.meaning: 结算；清算；完成款项处理
words.sentence: The dashboard compares confirmed orders with the daily settlement records.

words.meaning: 序列化；把数据转换为便于传输或存储的格式
words.sentence: JSON serialization failed because the object contained a circular reference.

words.meaning: 变更；对状态或数据进行修改
words.sentence: Avoid direct state mutation so the UI can update predictably.

words.meaning: 溢出；内容超出容器或数值范围
words.sentence: The long label causes horizontal overflow on narrow screens.

words.meaning: 理由；决策依据；背后的逻辑
words.sentence: Please explain the rationale behind changing the release sequence.

words.meaning: 可执行的；能够直接转化为行动的
words.sentence: The review should produce actionable feedback instead of general comments.
Check the transfer requirements before booking the connecting flight.

words.meaning: 报销；偿还已支付的费用
words.sentence: Keep the original receipts for travel reimbursement after the trip.

focus: 动态复习：activation / drop-off / reconciliation 仍是业务链路中的易混词，今天用 attribution / renewal / settlement 继续练习来源、续订与结算表达。
技术强化：继续间隔复习 idempotent / memoization / viewport，并用 serialization / mutation / overflow 描述数据传输、状态管理和移动端布局问题。
沟通练习：用 escalate / tentative 回顾问题升级和未确认计划，再用 rationale / actionable 说明决策依据并给出可执行反馈。
旅行复习：继续巩固 clear customs / overnight stopover，今天加入 transit / reimbursement，覆盖过境要求和费用报销场景。
